artifacts.summary: Server-side Lua ability artifact that preserves the existing talent draw activation behavior and updates the exported/configured trigger key from F4 to F5 via host-native constants/getters.
No ability_kv-side trigger-key field is defined in the provided scope; content is preserved unchanged so no other behavior is altered.

warnings: Exploratory/guided-native synthesis remains review-required until the implementation graduates.

request.rawPrompt: 把天赋抽取的触发键从 F4 改成 F5
request.goal: Change the talent draw trigger key from F4 to F5 while preserving all other existing behavior.

functional: Rebind the existing talent draw trigger from F4 to F5.
Keep all non-trigger talent draw logic unchanged.

typed.summary: Update the single existing key-binding trigger from F4 to F5.
invariants: No other selection, UI, pool, or effect behavior changes.

interactions: Player presses F5 to activate the existing talent draw flow.
dataNeeds: Existing triggerKey field in the source-backed selection_pool feature parameters.
outputs: Trigger key value updated to F5.

hostConstraints: Preserve unspecified existing behavior for feature 'talent_draw_demo'.
Keep the preserved module backbone stable: gameplay-core, shared-support, ui-surface.
No cross-feature coupling unless explicitly required.
nonFunctional: Minimize scope to a parameter-level trigger key update only.

states.summary: Configured hotkey for activating the talent draw flow.

flow.triggerSummary: Press F5 to start the existing talent draw selection flow.
sequence: Replace configured trigger key F4 with F5.
Retain existing weighted pool draw behavior.
Retain existing modal selection and single confirmation flow.
Retain existing immediate application behavior after selection.

expectedBindings.summary: Update the source-backed triggerKey parameter from F4 to F5.

acceptanceInvariants.summary: The feature still has exactly one trigger entry, now bound to F5.
Weighted pool, single confirmed choice, and same UI selection modal behavior remain unchanged.
No persistence, cross-feature grants, or other logic changes are introduced.

uncertainties.summary: F5 appears valid in the current parameter surface allow-list, so no format issue is expected.

resolvedAssumptions: The request is a minimal update to the existing source-backed feature 'talent_draw_demo'.
Only the trigger key should change; all unspecified behavior must be preserved.
The preserved module backbone remains gameplay-core, shared-support, and ui-surface.
F5 is an allowed trigger key in the current parameter surface.
